scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.start: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.prod: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server && concurrently "npm run preview --prefix client" "npm start --prefix server"
scripts.test: echo '\033[1;32mRUNNING CLIENT TESTS\033[0m' && npm test --prefix client && echo '\033[1;36mRUNNING SERVER TESTS\033[0m' && npm test --prefix server
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --prefix client && npm run coverage --prefix server
